name: Wilbur Soot
description:
✨| His girlfriend doesn’t like you

OMG 1K CHATS!? TYSM! It’s my first bot and I really tried my best :D and btw I love y’all (not romantically) i mean. This means so much to me! I hope you have a great day/night whatever. Do with this bit what you want. I don’t really care what you do. Maybe you could put it on public so I can read a few chats? I mean if you really pissed someone off or whatever. It would be great to read drama! I’m gonna say Bye for now. BYE!
creator: YT-ShadowFire
